panels.title: SKYAI mid price across all venues — top edge: bitget↔pancake (+25bp net) and gate↔pancake (+25bp net)
panels.description: Pancake clearly oscillates around the CEX consensus. The gap is the alpha source.

targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "binance" FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol='SKYAI_USDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now()) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "bybit" FROM bybit_bookticker WHERE symbol='SKYAI_USDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now()) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "bitget" FROM bitget_bookticker WHERE symbol='SKYAI_USDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now()) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "gate" FROM gate_bookticker WHERE symbol='SKYAI_USDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now()) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "mexc" FROM mexc_bookticker WHERE symbol='SKYAI_USDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now()) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "bingx" FROM bingx_bookticker WHERE symbol='SKYAI-USDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now()) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "pancake" FROM pancake_bookticker WHERE symbol='SKYAIUSDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now()) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 "aster" FROM aster_bookticker WHERE symbol='SKYAIUSDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now()) ORDER BY timestamp

panels.title: Pancake — Bitget basis (bp). +25bp net edge after fees on this pair.
panels.description: When this line is +X bp, sell SKYAI on Pancake AND buy on Bitget. Wait for revert (5s half-life).

targets.rawSql: WITH p AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM pancake_bookticker WHERE symbol='SKYAIUSDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())), bg AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM bitget_bookticker WHERE symbol='SKYAI_USDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())) SELECT p.timestamp time, (p.mid - bg.mid)/bg.mid*10000 "Pancake-Bitget bp" FROM p ASOF JOIN bg ORDER BY p.timestamp

WITH p AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM pancake_bookticker WHERE symbol='SKYAIUSDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())), gt AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM gate_bookticker WHERE symbol='SKYAI_USDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())) SELECT p.timestamp time, (p.mid - gt.mid)/gt.mid*10000 "Pancake-Gate bp" FROM p ASOF JOIN gt ORDER BY p.timestamp

WITH p AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM pancake_bookticker WHERE symbol='SKYAIUSDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())), m AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM mexc_bookticker WHERE symbol='SKYAI_USDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())) SELECT p.timestamp time, (p.mid - m.mid)/m.mid*10000 "Pancake-MEXC bp" FROM p ASOF JOIN m ORDER BY p.timestamp

panels.title: Live SKYAI mid + spread per venue (last 1min)
panels.description: Spread shows real cost to enter. Mid shows current quote.

targets.rawSql: SELECT 'binance' venue, last((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0) mid, round(avg((ask_price-bid_price)/((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0)*10000),2) spread_bp FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol='SKYAI_USDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-1,now()) UNION ALL SELECT 'bybit', last((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0), round(avg((ask_price-bid_price)/((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0)*10000),2) FROM bybit_bookticker WHERE symbol='SKYAI_USDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-1,now()) UNION ALL SELECT 'bitget', last((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0), round(avg((ask_price-bid_price)/((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0)*10000),2) FROM bitget_bookticker WHERE symbol='SKYAI_USDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-1,now()) UNION ALL SELECT 'gate', last((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0), round(avg((ask_price-bid_price)/((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0)*10000),2) FROM gate_bookticker WHERE symbol='SKYAI_USDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-1,now()) UNION ALL SELECT 'mexc', last((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0), round(avg((ask_price-bid_price)/((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0)*10000),2) FROM mexc_bookticker WHERE symbol='SKYAI_USDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-1,now()) UNION ALL SELECT 'bingx', last((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0), round(avg((ask_price-bid_price)/((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0)*10000),2) FROM bingx_bookticker WHERE symbol='SKYAI-USDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-1,now()) UNION ALL SELECT 'pancake', last((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0), round(avg((ask_price-bid_price)/((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0)*10000),2) FROM pancake_bookticker WHERE symbol='SKYAIUSDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-1,now()) UNION ALL SELECT 'aster', last((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0), round(avg((ask_price-bid_price)/((bid_price+ask_price)/2.0)*10000),2) FROM aster_bookticker WHERE symbol='SKYAIUSDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-1,now()) ORDER BY mid

panels.title: All pairwise SKYAI basis stats (mean/std/min/max bp, 30min)
panels.description: Pairs with std > 5bp + mean near 0 are best mean-revert candidates.

targets.rawSql: WITH p AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM pancake_bookticker WHERE symbol='SKYAIUSDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())), bg AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM bitget_bookticker WHERE symbol='SKYAI_USDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())), gt AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM gate_bookticker WHERE symbol='SKYAI_USDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())), m AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM mexc_bookticker WHERE symbol='SKYAI_USDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())), bx AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM bingx_bookticker WHERE symbol='SKYAI-USDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())), bb AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM bybit_bookticker WHERE symbol='SKYAI_USDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())), bn AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM binance_bookticker WHERE symbol='SKYAI_USDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())) SELECT 'pancake-bitget' pair, count() ticks, round(avg((p.mid-bg.mid)/bg.mid*10000),2) mean_bp, round(stddev_samp((p.mid-bg.mid)/bg.mid*10000),2) std_bp, round(min((p.mid-bg.mid)/bg.mid*10000),1) min_bp, round(max((p.mid-bg.mid)/bg.mid*10000),1) max_bp FROM p ASOF JOIN bg UNION ALL SELECT 'pancake-gate', count(), round(avg((p.mid-gt.mid)/gt.mid*10000),2), round(stddev_samp((p.mid-gt.mid)/gt.mid*10000),2), round(min((p.mid-gt.mid)/gt.mid*10000),1), round(max((p.mid-gt.mid)/gt.mid*10000),1) FROM p ASOF JOIN gt UNION ALL SELECT 'pancake-mexc', count(), round(avg((p.mid-m.mid)/m.mid*10000),2), round(stddev_samp((p.mid-m.mid)/m.mid*10000),2), round(min((p.mid-m.mid)/m.mid*10000),1), round(max((p.mid-m.mid)/m.mid*10000),1) FROM p ASOF JOIN m UNION ALL SELECT 'pancake-bingx', count(), round(avg((p.mid-bx.mid)/bx.mid*10000),2), round(stddev_samp((p.mid-bx.mid)/bx.mid*10000),2), round(min((p.mid-bx.mid)/bx.mid*10000),1), round(max((p.mid-bx.mid)/bx.mid*10000),1) FROM p ASOF JOIN bx UNION ALL SELECT 'pancake-bybit', count(), round(avg((p.mid-bb.mid)/bb.mid*10000),2), round(stddev_samp((p.mid-bb.mid)/bb.mid*10000),2), round(min((p.mid-bb.mid)/bb.mid*10000),1), round(max((p.mid-bb.mid)/bb.mid*10000),1) FROM p ASOF JOIN bb UNION ALL SELECT 'pancake-binance', count(), round(avg((p.mid-bn.mid)/bn.mid*10000),2), round(stddev_samp((p.mid-bn.mid)/bn.mid*10000),2), round(min((p.mid-bn.mid)/bn.mid*10000),1), round(max((p.mid-bn.mid)/bn.mid*10000),1) FROM p ASOF JOIN bn UNION ALL SELECT 'bitget-mexc', count(), round(avg((bg.mid-m.mid)/m.mid*10000),2), round(stddev_samp((bg.mid-m.mid)/m.mid*10000),2), round(min((bg.mid-m.mid)/m.mid*10000),1), round(max((bg.mid-m.mid)/m.mid*10000),1) FROM bg ASOF JOIN m UNION ALL SELECT 'binance-bybit', count(), round(avg((bn.mid-bb.mid)/bb.mid*10000),2), round(stddev_samp((bn.mid-bb.mid)/bb.mid*10000),2), round(min((bn.mid-bb.mid)/bb.mid*10000),1), round(max((bn.mid-bb.mid)/bb.mid*10000),1) FROM bn ASOF JOIN bb ORDER BY std_bp DESC

panels.title: All pairwise SKYAI basis (bp) — visualizes which pair oscillates most
panels.description: The pair with biggest std (range) and crossing 0 frequently is the best basis-arb target.

targets.rawSql: WITH p AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM pancake_bookticker WHERE symbol='SKYAIUSDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())), bg AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM bitget_bookticker WHERE symbol='SKYAI_USDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())) SELECT p.timestamp time, (p.mid - bg.mid)/bg.mid*10000 "P-Bitget" FROM p ASOF JOIN bg ORDER BY p.timestamp

WITH p AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM pancake_bookticker WHERE symbol='SKYAIUSDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())), gt AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM gate_bookticker WHERE symbol='SKYAI_USDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())) SELECT p.timestamp time, (p.mid - gt.mid)/gt.mid*10000 "P-Gate" FROM p ASOF JOIN gt ORDER BY p.timestamp

WITH p AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM pancake_bookticker WHERE symbol='SKYAIUSDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())), m AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM mexc_bookticker WHERE symbol='SKYAI_USDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())) SELECT p.timestamp time, (p.mid - m.mid)/m.mid*10000 "P-MEXC" FROM p ASOF JOIN m ORDER BY p.timestamp

WITH bg AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM bitget_bookticker WHERE symbol='SKYAI_USDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())), m AS (SELECT timestamp, (bid_price+ask_price)/2.0 mid FROM mexc_bookticker WHERE symbol='SKYAI_USDT' AND timestamp > dateadd('m',-30,now())) SELECT bg.timestamp time, (bg.mid - m.mid)/m.mid*10000 "Bitget-MEXC" FROM bg ASOF JOIN m ORDER BY bg.timestamp
